heading: What we actually check before we recommend anything

cards.title: Local, not remote
cards.text: We're based in the Maldives, not running this from another country off a spreadsheet of resort brochures.

cards.title: One total price
cards.text: Room, transfer, tax, and meal plan, shown together — before you pay, every time.

cards.title: Certified partners only
cards.text: Dive centers, fishing charters, and camping operators are checked for licensing ourselves, not taken on trust.

cards.title: Fast, honest replies
cards.text: Real answers on WhatsApp, usually within 15 minutes, not a script or a sales pitch.
